anthropic_fellows_application.text: Applications are now closed for our July cohort. Any applications submitted will be stored until evaluation begins for future cohorts. Our next cohort will start in late September. Candidates must be fluent in Python programming and available full-time.

program_logistics.text: To participate in the Fellows program, you need to have or independently obtain full-time work authorization in the USA, UK, or Canada. We are not currently able to sponsor visas for fellows.
